user.title: Cellcom Energy — Connect Account
user.description:
## How to get your Cellcom token

**Step 1** — Log in to Cellcom in your browser:
[Open Cellcom login page](https://cellcom.co.il/Authentication/otp-login-page/)

**Step 2** — After logging in, open the browser console (**F12 → Console** tab) and run:

```
copy(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('auth_token')))
```

The token is now in your clipboard.

**Step 3** — Paste the token in the field below and click **Submit**.

data_description.tokens_json: Paste the JWT token copied from the browser console (starts with eyJ)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Cellcom servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_tokens_json: The pasted token is not valid. Make sure it starts with eyJ and is complete.
error.no_energy_account: No Cellcom Energy (electricity) account was found. Make sure you have an active electricity contract with Cellcom.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cellcom Energy account is already configured.
